title: FPS Booster PVP
body:
# No more lower fps with this modpack.
Our modpack was developed especially for players looking for an experience optimized for PvP with high FPS performance. It combines lightness and functionality, ideal for those who need agility and quick response in battles, as well as a clean, distraction-free look.

This modpack includes mods for performance, which is essential for customizing video settings, reducing lag, and achieving greater fp stability. Plus, it comes configured to maximize performance, with automatic rendering adjustments and optimized graphics. So you can maintain a high FPS even on crowded servers and busy PvP arenas.

Focusing on PvP, the modpack removes unnecessary graphical effects and distracting sounds, keeping only the essentials for a fluid combat experience. Tools like BetterFPS and FoamFix are included to ensure Minecraft consumes as little memory as possible, allowing for fast performance on low-RAM systems.
